questionHtml: Outline the impact of antibiotic waste on the environment.
markschemeHtml:
«leads to bacterial» resistance «to antibiotics»
OR
destroys useful/beneficial bacteria
OR
useful/beneficial/less harmful bacteria replaced with «more» harmful bacteria ✔

NOTE: Accept "affects/disturbs micro-ecosystems".

meta.title: Outline the impact of antibiotic waste on the environment.
breadcrumbLabels: D.6 Environmental impact of some medications
